name: Gary Palmer
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $257,757 for Gary Palmer in U.S. House, AL-06. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
